name: rubynod
description: Rubynod — VS Code-class editor with built-in AI assistant

scripts.build: bash scripts/ensure-node.sh npm run build -w @rubynod/shared -w @rubynod/index -w @rubynod/mcp -w @rubynod/ai -w @rubynod/cli -w rubynod-ai-ui
scripts.dev:ext: bash scripts/ensure-node.sh npm run watch -w rubynod-ai-ui
scripts.package:ext: bash scripts/ensure-node.sh sh -c 'npm run build && npm run bundle:server && npm run build -w rubynod-ai-ui && cd extensions/rubynod-ai-ui && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies -o ../../dist'
scripts.install:ext: bash scripts/ensure-node.sh sh -c 'VSIX=$(ls -1t dist/rubynod-ai-ui-*.vsix 2>/dev/null | head -1) && code --install-extension "$VSIX" --force'
scripts.rebuild:native: echo 'No native modules to rebuild (index uses sql.js).'
